name: umans-vision-handoff
description: Plugin(s) for routing image reads to native-vision Umans models (Kimi first) when the active model is text-only (e.g. GLM 5.2 via-handoff).

plugins.name: umans-vision-handoff
plugins.description: Adds a view_image tool that hands images to a native-vision Umans model (Kimi first, with fallbacks) for text-only providers like GLM 5.2.
